text:
COMMENT: The PDSS model file was new in 2021, and is retired after 2023. This PDSS Model file is not produced 
after 2023. The type of drug for each insulin national drug code (NDC) was documented by CMS in the 
NDC List for the model drugs. Additional details are on the CMS website; reference the Innovation 
Center webpage for the Part D Senior Savings Program.
